cigars.description: This awesome premium cigar was created to celebrate the 1502 brand’s first ten years. Enrique Sanchez founded Global Premium Cigars in 2012 as a way to showcase Nicaragua’s fine tobaccos and cigars. The 1502 brand was named after the year Christopher Columbus discovered Nicaragua.

It has a double binder and long filler from Nicaragua. With its Maduro sun-grown tobacco wrapper, nurtured with all the natural elements where it gets its flavor, especially it's strength and character.

The 1502 Blue Sapphire is the sixth release under the 1502 brand, which is owned by Global Premium Cigars. It sets itself apart from the other lines in the brand by having a parejo (which has a round cap and straight sides) shape and an open foot. It is a full-strength Nicaraguan puro that combines with a dark, oily maduro wrapper to deliver a warm tobacco flavor highlighted with notes of spice and cedar. The 1502 Blue Sapphire is handmade in Nicaragua by Plasencia Cigars.

Our master blender had created this cigar from a combination of carefully selected and aged tobacco leaves. It has a subtle strength, with flavor and aroma that could only be achieved with the blend of Corojo Habano de Nicaragua, long fillers from San Andres – Mexico and fields from Estelí and Condega in Nicaragua.

cigars.description: #html-body [data-pb-style=S9KM40P]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}#html-body [data-pb-style=Q93TL0D]{border-style:none}#html-body [data-pb-style=A0ISVMF],#html-body [data-pb-style=B4U7STP]{max-width:100%;height:auto}#html-body [data-pb-style=Y6K38EW]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}@media only screen and (max-width: 768px) { #html-body [data-pb-style=Q93TL0D]{border-style:none} }Premium cigars are what Famous Smoke Shop is all about. But to buy premium cigars online, smoke them and enjoy them, you need to know what makes 'em different. What distinguishes a "premium" from a "non-premium" is that premium cigars are made entirely by hand with long leaf or mixed fill (Cuban sandwich) tobaccos - wrapped in whole tobacco leaf, a 100% leaf tobacco binder and has no filter, tip or non-tobacco mouthpiece (among other qualities). Want us to drop some more stogie knowledge? Stick around, we'll tell you everything: where to buy cigar boxes, how to season a humidor, and more - but let's start with how to score a tremendous deal on premiums like these. See, what sets us apart from the rest is that we smoke what we sell, and we wouldn't sell it if we wouldn't smoke it. So if you want to know where to buy good cigars and want the ins and outs on achieving premium cigar satisfaction, you start at Famous. We're right here at the hottest corner in the neighborhood: the intersection of best premium cigars and discount prices.

#html-body [data-pb-style=KHYQ3J0]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}#html-body [data-pb-style=IONK6F7]{border-style:none}#html-body [data-pb-style=BX2M20N],#html-body [data-pb-style=LN2FTSM]{max-width:100%;height:auto}#html-body [data-pb-style=I1L9WWY]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}@media only screen and (max-width: 768px) { #html-body [data-pb-style=IONK6F7]{border-style:none} }If you’re looking for a machine made cigar that’s tasty on your wallet, look no further than our Famous discount machine made cigars online. Shop top brands like Swisher, Phillies, Dutch Masters, Backwoods, and so many more. These machine-made cigars are a cigar smoker’s best friend, whether you’re a regular smoker or an occasional one. Machine-made cigars boast excellent tobaccos and impeccable construction. That makes these a perfect pick for when you don’t have much time to spare or simply prefer the consistency of machine rolled cigars. Machine made cigarillos deliver consistent smoke quality and satisfying flavor, with a little something for every palate. Shop the best machine-made cigars at Famous’ unbeatable prices today!

#html-body [data-pb-style=O9XVCEC]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}Discover the Art of Boutique Cigars
Experience the refined pleasure of boutique cigars, where tradition, passion, and craftsmanship unite to deliver a truly distinctive smoke. Our handpicked collection features exclusive boutique cigar brands such as Foundation, Illusione, Warped, Caldwell, Dunbarton Tobacco & Trust, Crowned Heads, and more. Each crafted in small batches for unmatched quality and character.
Whether you’re exploring boutique blends for the first time or expanding your connoisseur’s collection, you’ll find cigars that offer exceptional flavor, complexity, and aroma in every draw. With decades of expertise, we help you uncover unique cigars that reflect your personal taste and elevate every moment.
Browse our boutique cigar selection and discover unique finds crafted with authenticity and depth that define the world’s finest premium hand made cigars.

#html-body [data-pb-style=JI77IQ4]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}A small cigar is the ideal type of smoke to light up when you don't have a lot of time on your hands to enjoy some premium hand rolled tobacco goodness. So, when we talk about these smaller, more compact sizes, we're referring to the likes of a corona, petite corona, Cuban corona, short panatela, small panatela or a petite belicoso. A small cigar is also often the choice of new cigar smokers who are testing out the waters and aren't quite ready to graduate to a larger stick yet. Famous Smoke Shop carries all of the very best brands and you're sure to find the double corona you love.

#html-body [data-pb-style=NVGAC1D]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}Cigarillos Cigars: The best part of smoking cigarillo cigars? You can pretend you're the star of a spaghetti western...without having to clean up after the horses. But seriously - while cigarillos have long occupied the silver screen alongside a cowboy riding off into the sunset, we know they're a favorite of both new cigar smokers and old hands who are just looking for a quick draw of flavor from these little cigars. Famous Smoke Shop offers a huge selection of discount cigarillo cigars from many of the world's best premium cigar brands, at a low price you'll only find here.

cigars.description: Browse over 550 cigar brands! Holt’s is your #1 source to buy cigars online. We carry all the name brands you know and love at the lowest possible prices. All cigars purchased come with a 100% guarantee of satisfaction. Get great cigars today!

We aim to satisfy savvy customers who are always in search of the hottest new cigars on the market. We have warehouse aisles dedicated to all the finest new cigar brands we’re constantly adding. Unlimited numbers of hand-rolled, new and exciting blends arrive every day. Smoke a new cigar today, you deserve it!

Trust the cigar experts when you’re looking for the best new cigars to smoke. We’ve all got our favorites. More importantly, we’ve got access to the palatial, humidified Holt’s warehouse, where every brand known to man is stored. And we’ve smoked them all. We’ll guide you with our recommendations whether you’re looking for an old classic, a hot new release, a small-batch gem, or an inexpensive bundle. Take our advice when you want to know what cigars the professional aficionados love the most these days.

At Holt’s, we specialize in stocking a boundless inventory of best-selling cigar bundles. Value and quality come together at the lowest possible prices on all of our bundles. Buy a bundle of cigars you know and love, or try a new brand. Cigar bundles are easy and affordable purchases due to our everyday low prices. Your senses and your savings will exceed your expectations!

A number of brands like CAO, Drew Estate, Acid, Rocky Patel, Tatiana, Nub Nuance, and more make great flavored cigars when you're looking for sweet smokes that taste like vanilla, chocolate, cherries, coffee, pumpkin spice, and dozens of other tasty sweets. Flavored cigars are also often referred to as infused cigars. Check out our mouthwatering menu below.

cigars.description:
Welcome to our huge online selection of top quality brands! Since 2001, we have been bringing our loyal customers the absolute best selection of premium stogies. For our machine made products, we offer great choices: little, filtered , and tipped cigars, flavored cigarillos and much more.
For smokers on the go, check out our tubed style brands, and keep them fresh and protected with our tin selection. Our prices are guaranteed to fit anyone’s budget. We are committed to satisfying all smokers who love to light up. We also have detailed information for anyone new to smoking. We keep our inventory full of the most popular premium brands on the market, including the 90+ rated brands.
                
                    Read more
    
            
                Here at Gotham, you will find a variety of premium cigars including top brands such as Alec Bradley, Rocky Patel, Arturo Fuente, Montecristo and many more. We have you covered with the top selling domestic brands on the market such as Dutch Masters, Swisher Sweets, Black and Mild, Winchester, Captain Black, Clipper, etc.
We offer an immense selection of high quality smokes at amazing prices. The prices we present are always a deal. If you do not see a specific brand you really enjoy please email us and we would be happy to help recommending something which will fit your palette choice. Browse our store today and enjoy an easy online shopping experience!

Carrillo Inch Nicaragua Padron Anniversary 1964 Natural Crowned Heads La Vereda Epic La Rubia Gurkha San Miguel Product rating //<![CDATA[ var lbl_rated = 'Rated!'; var lbl_error = 'Error'; var lbl_cancel_vote = 'Already rated'; //]]> .color { color: #ed871c !important; font-size: 25px; } ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Customer Reviews ★ ★ ★ ★ ☆ Shawn Albers - Padron 1926 Anniversary Maduro 4 Cigar Sampler (Verified buyer) Four great sizes in the 26 series! I highly recommend this sampler for all to try! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Shawn Albers - Padron 1964 Anniversary Natural 5 Cigar Sampler (Verified buyer) Love the padron 64 sampler. Can’t go wrong with the natural or maduro. Great sizes to see what you prefer.

A REVIEW (Customer Feedback) 5 STAR: 0 4 STAR: 1 3 STAR: 0 2 STAR: 1 1 STAR: 0 $("#rating").hover(function(){ $("#show-rating").toggle(); }) function ShowReviews() { var container = $('body'); $("#ui-id-2").trigger('click'); var scrollTo = $("#product-tabs-feedback"); var $targetEle = $("#product-tabs-feedback"); $('html, body').stop().animate({ 'scrollTop': $targetEle.offset().top -100 }, 800, 'swing', function () { window.location.hash = targetEle; }); //$('body').scrollTo('#'); } “It’s a boy!” The words every first-time dad hopes to hear when that special moment finally comes. Of course, once you’ve had your first boy, you may be praying for “It’s a girl!” the next time around...
